## Desired outcome

## On-brand checklist
- [ ] Clarity over cleverness; CTA-first
- [ ] Numbers do the bragging (specific, benchmarked where possible)
- [ ] No banned words (see `docs/copywriting.md` lexicon)
- [ ] Tone matches context (calm errors, understated success)
